name: Ceramic Table Lamp with Wood Base - Threshold™
description:
Bring chic style to any tabletop with the Ceramic Table Lamp with Wood Base from Project 62™. Topped with a linen drum shade that softens the light, this decorative table lamp stands atop a shapely round tiered base made of gray ceramic and tan wood for an attractive look. Place it on an end table or nightstand to complete the look of your space.

1962 was a big year. Modernist design hit its peak and moved into homes across the country. And in Minnesota, Target was born — with the revolutionary idea to celebrate design for all. Project 62 embodies this legacy with a collection of modern pieces made for everyday living.
